text.title: Anti-Pattern Rationale Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) pinning the shape of a valid artefact, plus one valid example, one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator rejects.

list.pattern: owner is a plural pronoun (team / we / us / engineering) or empty.
evidence_link is empty AND hypothesis_for_cause cites a URL inline.
rationale length < 80 chars OR contains no input name from inputs_used.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "anti-pattern-rationale-template-example", "owner": "@solo-founder", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "ui_surface": "ui_surface value", "anti_pattern_name": "anti_pattern_name value", "evidence_link": "evidence_link value", "hypothesis_for_cause": "hypothesis_for_cause value", "severity": "0", "recommended_action": "recommended_action value", "rationale": "rationale value", "inputs_used": [ "item-1", "item-2", "item-3" ] }
example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
Invalid — required fields missing OR forbidden patterns matched (e.g. version not semver).
